title: From Traditional Methods to GPT-based Models for 2D Video Game Level Procedural Content Generation: An Empirical Study
description_es: Este estudio empírico compara métodos tradicionales de generación de contenido con modelos GPT modernos para crear niveles de videojuegos.

publication.venue: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics (SMC)

abstract: Procedural content generation (PCG) for video games has evolved significantly. This paper provides an empirical comparison between traditional methods and modern GPT-based approaches for generating 2D game levels, evaluating their effectiveness and applicability.

citations.apa: Cerezo, D., & Triguero, I. (2025). From Traditional Methods to GPT-based Models for 2D Video Game Level Procedural Content Generation: An Empirical Study. In 2025 IEEE International Conference on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics (SMC) (pp. 3260-3267). IEEE.
citations.mla: Cerezo, David, and Isaac Triguero. "From Traditional Methods to GPT-based Models for 2D Video Game Level Procedural Content Generation: An Empirical Study." 2025 IEEE International Conference on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics (SMC), IEEE, 2025, pp. 3260-3267.
